use_codes.desc: PREVENTION OF ACUTE CARDIAC ISCHEMIC EVENTS
USE OF AGGRASTAT IN COMBINATION WITH HEPARIN

A DOSING REGIMEN OF AGGRASTAT (TIROFIBAN HYDROCHLORIDE)(25MCG/KG FOLLOWED BY 0.15MCG/KG/MIN INFUSION) TO REDUCE THE RATE OF THROMBOTIC CORONARY EVENTS ASSOCIATED WITH ACUTE CORONARY SYNDROME (ACS) IN PATIENTS WITH NON-ST ELEVATION ACS
METHOD OF TREATING ACS USING ANGIOPLASTY WITH AGGRASTAT (TIROFIBAN HYDROCHLORIDE)
METHOD OF INHIBITING PLATELET AGGREGATION WITH AGGRASTAT (TIROFIBAN HYDROCHLORIDE)
